description.en: You attack with a poison coated tail. Make a melee attack roll against your opponent, dealing 1d4 + MOVE poison damage. If you do you have disadvantage on your attack roll, but it you hit your target you land a critical hit on natural rolls of 15 or higher.

description.en: You force another to share their power. Choose one target to make a Wisdom saving throw against your MOVE DC. On a failure your choice of your Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, or Wisdom score is averaged with theirs. Both your and the target's score is now that new average. Your scores return to their previous values at the end of this move's duration.

description.en: You take your opponent's power in exchange for your own. Choose one target to make an Intelligence saving throw. On a failure you gain advantage on attack rolls you make on each of your turns until this move's duration is up or it ends in any other way. If the target failed the saving throw they also gain advantage on attack rolls on each of their turns until this move's duration is up or it ends in any other way.
